name: air-visual
description: Tier 1 Airbnb host photo optimizer MVP with a Chrome extension and a stateless Ollama proxy.

scripts.check: node --check server/server.mjs && node --check background.js && node --check content.js && node --check sidepanel.js && node --check scripts/build-cws-package.mjs && python -m py_compile scripts/generate_cws_assets.py
